title.en: The three following places are over, and the ne...

content.en:
The final price for the second spot was not as high as the first one, and only 240,000 Galanbo coins were auctioned.

However, the third place, the last place, was auctioned even more exaggeratedly, and it was auctioned for 270,000 Galanbao coins.

Obviously, some peak realm gods have not been bidding with all their might, and when they saw that the quota was almost gone, they were in a hurry, so the auction price of the third quota would be the highest.

The three following places are over, and the next is the staff spot.

That's the most important auction!

"Next up is the auction of the staff quota of our Garanbao ship, with a starting price of 200,000 Galanbo coins!" said the auctioneer.

200,000 Galanbao coins, this is undoubtedly very high, it is already comparable to the price of a place with the ship, and it is only the starting price, and the real transaction price must be higher than this price.

But there are only a few pinnacle realm gods who really bid for it, after all, there are not many pinnacle realm gods who really want to become employees of the Jialanbao ship. 05

For some pinnacle realm gods, becoming an employee of the Garanbao ship will undoubtedly be subject to some constraints, it is better to follow the ship, at least it is still full of infinite future, maybe there is still hope to join a stronger strength than the Garanbao ship, and there are not so many constraints.

But some peak realm gods don't want to take risks, so it's better to become an employee of the Garanbao ship.

It can only be said that the choice of each peak realm god is different!

Soon, the auction began.

In a short time, the auction price soared to 300,000!

Four hundred thousand!

500,000!

Obviously, these peak realm gods have accumulated a lot of resources.

However, this kind of resource is not the resource of the force, but the resource of the individual.

After all, once the auction is won, it will be completely separated from the supreme force, where will the supreme force provide resources, wouldn't it be a bamboo basket for nothing!

Although the Peak Realm God became an employee of the Gala Treasure Ship and was able to come back, even if he returned, he would not recognize the original supreme force, nor would it bring any help to the original supreme force.

There are even some peak realm gods who will completely abandon the supreme force they are in, and they will not talk about it at all.

It is rumored that a long time ago, a supreme force also spent a lot of resources to buy a place for a peak realm god to buy a place for the Jialan Treasure Ship, but as a result, nothing was gained, and even the power weakened a little.

Since then, no supreme force has done such a thing.

Soon, the auction price had soared to 800,000 Galanbao coins.

Seeing this, the peak realm god of the Garlan Treasure Ship was very happy.

In the end, a pinnacle demon seed won the auction price of 870,000 Galanbol coins.

......

"A place for the employees of the Garanbao Ship costs 870,000 Galanbo coins, which is too expensive!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Even if he took out his entire net worth, he couldn't afford such a place.

Of course, he won't buy it either.

Originally, after the auction of the staff quota of the Garanbo ship, this auction will end, and it also marks the official end of the transaction of the Garanbo ship, they need to leave the Garanbo ship, and the Garanbo ship will also leave from here and go to other territories.

But at this time, the peak realm god of the Garlan Treasure Ship said, "Ladies and gentlemen, the next time our Gala Treasure Ship will come will be after one-tenth of an extradimensional era. "

One out of ten extradimensional epochs!!

Many peak realm gods were extremely shocked, this time interval is too short, according to this time interval, in an extradimensional era, the Galanbao ship will come ten times, which is earlier than before.

Of course, this is a good thing.

These supreme power pinnacle realm gods still wish the Galan Treasure Ship would come often, and it would be even better if they stayed here all the time.

"One tenth of an extradimensional era, that's not too long!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The calculation method of the extradimensional epoch is a time calculation method of the Death Void, one extradimensional epoch is equivalent to 100 million extradimensional years, and one extradimensional epoch is equivalent to 100 million solstice years to the Dao era.

One-tenth of the extradimensional era, that is, a hundred trillion years to the Dao era.

However, at this moment, the Peak Realm God of the Garanbao Ship said again: "Of course, the one-tenth of the extradimensional era is only an estimated time, it may be a period of time in advance, and it will definitely not be delayed. Moreover, the next time will be the last, when we will sell more co-ship slots and Slots for Garanbo Ship employees. "

"What, for the last time?"

These peak realm gods and peak demon seeds were all stunned.

I knew it was the last time, and they would definitely compete desperately just now!

Ye Tian also frowned, he didn't understand what the Galanbao Ship was doing, if the news was revealed before the auction, the bidding would become extremely fierce, no matter which place it was, I am afraid that it would be above one million Galanbol coins. []

Isn't this an obvious opportunity to make money, so why doesn't the Garanbao ship care?

Perhaps, the Galan Treasure Ship really doesn't care about the hundreds of thousands of Galan Treasure Coins, and no matter how many resources these peak realm gods and peak demon seeds accumulate, they will participate in the auction frantically for the last time, but 540 is not in a hurry to harvest this time.

"Lord Morning Realm God, why is the next time the Garanbao Ship the last time?"

A pinnacle realm god asked.

This Morning Screaming Realm God is the peak Realm God in charge of the auction, and he said truthfully: "It's not that we don't want to come, but your area, after one-tenth of the extradimensional era, will usher in a superdimensional storm, that is a storm from the extradimensional void, in the extradimensional storm, our Jialanbao ship does not dare to come, otherwise we will definitely die." "

Extradimensional Storm?

The peak realm gods were extremely confused, they didn't know what the extradimensional storm was, and it was the first time they had heard of this.

However, they wanted to continue asking, but the Morning Singing Realm God was unwilling to answer.

However, each Peak Realm God can still purchase an Extradimensional Storm Intelligence from the Garanbao Ship, and each Realm God only needs to pay one thousand Galanbol Coins.

Ye Tian was also very curious about the extradimensional storm, so he immediately purchased a piece of information.

Even if it is a piece of information, it is necessary to make an oath and not to pass it on, otherwise only one copy will be sold, wouldn't everyone know.

Only in this way can you sell a lot of copies.

After buying the information, he had enough understanding of the extradimensional storm, and finally knew why the Garanbao ship didn't dare to come.
